name: skillc
description: Self-building skills: source that rebuilds itself on whoever receives it.

plugins.name: skillc
plugins.description: The builder. Package a working skill into one self-building file that rebuilds and tests itself on whoever receives it.

plugins.name: skillc-examples
plugins.description: Worked self-building example skills (voice, explain-plainly, commit-message). The demos, separate from the tool.
